title: Fix camera audio availability detection on mobile live grid
note: Minor mobile frontend bugfix; nurby has audio availability already.

title: Allow GenAI providers to be initialized lazily
note: Frigate now tolerates a GenAI provider that fails on initial load and retries lazily. Check services/perception/vlm.py provider init: does a bad provider key crash the worker at startup, or degrade gracefully?

title: Replace export ffmpeg argument blocklist with a structural allowlist
insight: Blocklist on user ffmpeg export args was bypassable -> arbitrary file r/w + SSRF; switched to allowlist.
nurby_evidence: conversation_clip.py / analyzer.py pass Recording.file_path to ffmpeg via permissive _resolve_path; no arg allowlist. Stream URL had no scheme validation (now fixed, see #23352).
action: Allowlist ffmpeg flags; constrain file paths via shared/paths containment; block private-net SSRF on http stream/snapshot URLs.

title: Generate API docs spec with per-endpoint authentication requirements
note: Nurby already ships OpenAPI; auth-per-endpoint annotation is a nice-to-have.

title: Fix autotracking camera crash from non-finite tracker distance values
insight: PTZ autotracking divided by / normalized a tracker distance that could be NaN/inf -> crash.
nurby_evidence: Object tracker (tracker.py) IS guarded, BUT nurby has ptz_smart_track_* (schemas.py:141-155) whose move math (gain*distance, deadzone, max_speed) was NOT inspected.
action: Audit PTZ smart-track controller for non-finite pan/tilt/zoom deltas; clamp + skip move on non-finite.

title: Fix chat tool calling and prompt breaking
insight: Tool calls were dropped from subsequent messages (model lost context); system prompt fixes.
nurby_evidence: agent/driver.py re-appends tool_use + tool_result blocks each turn, jsonschema-validates args, falls back to {} on bad JSON across all providers. Already robust.

title: Add recording keyframe analysis to camera probe dialog
insight: Probe a camera's recording to surface keyframe interval / smart-codec issues that hurt recording quality.
nurby_evidence: No recording-keyframe diagnostic in camera probe found.
action: Add ffprobe-based keyframe-interval readout to camera diagnostics; warn on long GOP / B-frames.

title: Miscellaneous fixes (CameraConfigUpdateSubscriber ZMQ narrowing)
note: Frigate ZMQ per-camera subscription bug; nurby uses Redis streams + DB poll, not ZMQ.

title: Chapter tweaks (MP4 export chapters)
note: Relates to MP4 export chapters (#23310). Minor.

title: Miscellaneous fixes
note: Opaque grab-bag; revisit if a theme needs it.

title: Update reference config
note: YAML reference config; nurby is DB-driven.

title: Mobile UI/UX improvements
note: Frontend polish; revisit during a UI parity pass.

title: Add snapshot download to History player
note: Does nurby timeline allow downloading a frame snapshot? Check during UI pass.

title: Upgrade ffmpeg to 8 by default
note: Check ffmpeg version baked into nurby ingestion/api images; ffmpeg 8 has decode/hwaccel improvements.

title: Add ability to hide cameras from review UI
insight: Hide a camera from the review/alerts feed independently of hiding from the live dashboard.
nurby_evidence: Camera-wall hide (commit b870614) hides from dashboard; no separate exclude-from-timeline/alerts flag.
action: Add per-camera exclude_from_review flag; still records, drops from timeline/alerts feed + filters.

title: Optimize motion activity endpoint
note: Part of the motion-search/review theme. See initiatives/motion-search-and-review.md

title: Refactor motion search
insight: Scrub a time range by where/when motion happened (motion search), part of Frigate's review subsystem.
action: See initiatives/motion-search-and-review.md

title: Tweaks
note: Opaque.

title: Support onvif PasswordText cameras in the add camera wizard
insight: Some ONVIF cameras need PasswordText (vs PasswordDigest) WS-Security auth.
nurby_evidence: Check services/discovery/onvif.py auth mode handling.
action: Support both PasswordText and PasswordDigest ONVIF auth.

title: Motion search fixes
note: Motion-search theme. See initiative.

title: Allow rtsps:// in camera wizard URL validation
insight: Accept rtsps:// (RTSP over TLS) in camera URL validation.
nurby_evidence: Nurby had NO stream-URL scheme validation -> also a file:// / SSRF surface.
action: DONE: added stream-type-aware scheme allowlist (shared/schemas.py validate_stream_url) accepting rtsps:// and rejecting file:///gopher:// etc. + tests.

title: Clone camera settings
insight: Duplicate an existing camera's config to a new camera to speed multi-camera setup.
action: Add 'clone camera' (copy config sans stream_url/credentials) endpoint + UI button.

title: Add live streams widget
note: Dashboard widget; UI parity pass.

title: Restore runtime state on startup
insight: Persist runtime toggles across restarts (overlay on YAML).
nurby_evidence: Nurby config is DB-driven; toggles already persist. Frigate needed this only due to YAML provisioning.

title: Add script to investigate accuracy of classification training set
note: Frigate+ classifier training tooling.

title: feat: add Traditional Chinese (zh-Hant) language option
Add ability to control chapters set on MP4 Export
note: MP4 chapter markers on export; minor.

title: Add motion review docs
note: Signals Frigate's 'motion review' feature; captured in initiative.

title: Profiles fixes
note: Config profiles tied to YAML provisioning model.

title: Filter motion review by allowed cameras
insight: Motion review results filtered by the requesting user's allowed cameras.
nurby_evidence: Main list endpoints (events/recordings/observations/cameras) have NO per-user camera filtering; all authenticated users see all cameras. Guardian path IS scoped.
action: See initiatives/camera-access-control.md (architectural; issue filed, not auto-fixed).

title: Debug replay resolution
note: Frigate debug_replay tooling.

title: Fix GenAI Signature
note: GenAI provider signature fix; revisit if vlm bug emerges.

title: Support Dynamic Thinking Models
insight: Support reasoning/thinking models (dynamic thinking budget) in GenAI calls.
nurby_evidence: vlm.py/agent use Claude+OpenAI which expose thinking; nurby does not set/handle thinking budgets or strip reasoning tokens.
action: Support thinking/reasoning params + token handling for reasoning models in vlm + agent.

title: Improve credential redaction handling
insight: Strip passwords/api keys/proxy secret from config endpoint + improve redaction.
nurby_evidence: Nurby stores camera creds separately (Fernet) from stream_url; build_auth_url result is not logged. Config/secrets not echoed. No creds in log path.

title: Fix admin response cache leak to non-admin users via nginx proxy_cache
insight: proxy_cache_key must include authenticated role/user so admin responses are not served to non-admins.
nurby_evidence: No nginx proxy_cache / HTTP response caching in nurby. BUT the new dashboard widget_proxy cache (widget_proxy.py) is keyed by widget_id only, not user -> minor cross-user data reuse. Filed P3.
action: Key widget_proxy cache by user (or auth scope).

title: Filter outbound websocket broadcasts by per-recipient camera access
insight: Outbound WS messages filtered by each recipient's camera access (custom views).
nurby_evidence: services/api/ws.py _deliver_local/broadcast/relay_loop push every event to every connected client; no per-user/per-camera filtering. Guardian alerts also broadcast to all.
action: See initiatives/camera-access-control.md (issue filed; architectural, not auto-fixed).

title: Improve go2rtc pane in Settings
note: Nurby uses MediaMTX, not go2rtc.

title: Add attributes to UI filters list
note: Object attributes/sub-labels in filters; check nurby attribute support.

title: fix: fix chat request params miss runtime_options
note: Check agent passes runtime options through.

title: Add metadata for creation time in recordings / exports
note: Embed creation-time metadata in mp4 recordings/exports.

title: Merge detector and model in settings UI
note: Detector+model config UX; revisit in detector parity pass.

title: Implement semantic query for chat
insight: Chat answers backed by semantic (vector) search over events.
nurby_evidence: Nurby agent already does pgvector semantic search (services/search) + tools.

title: Improve Intel Stats
note: Intel GPU stats; nurby CPU-only.

title: Fix multi-GPU OpenVINO detection for enrichments
note: OpenVINO multi-GPU; nurby has no OpenVINO path.

title: API access improvements
note: Check nurby scoped API tokens parity.

title: Gracefully handle transiently failing os.stat calls
insight: os.path.exists()+getsize() idiom races and crashes on transient FS errors (Errno 121 Remote I/O) on network mounts.
nurby_evidence: guardian/video.py:44,62 + conversation_clip.py:158 used unguarded exists()+getsize().
action: DONE: added shared.paths.safe_getsize() + swapped 4 call sites (guardian/video.py, conversation_clip.py, ingestion/stream.py) + tests.

title: Implement cross-camera safety for indexed media folders
insight: Prevent one camera's indexed media from being accessed under another camera's scope.
nurby_evidence: Same root gap as camera-ACL initiative; media-serving endpoints not per-user scoped.
action: Folded into initiatives/camera-access-control.md (issue #40).

title: log(masks): include camera name in invalid-coordinates error
note: Minor log-context improvement.

title: fix: format placeholder in remove_empty_directories debug log
fix(face_recognition): feed BGR (not RGB) to FaceDetectorYN
insight: Feeding RGB to a BGR-trained face detector silently degrades detection confidence.
nurby_evidence: Verified nurby channel order is correct: InsightFace gets BGR (faces.py:74), CLIP converts BGR->RGB (vlm_gate.py:145), EasyOCR uses grayscale (plates.py:79), YOLO gets BGR (ultralytics handles). No bug.

note: AMD ROCm; nurby has no ROCm path.

note: Intel GPU stats.

insight: Ollama Cloud needs api_key bearer auth, not just a base URL.
nurby_evidence: Check vlm.py Ollama provider supports an api_key header for hosted Ollama.
action: Backlog: add optional api_key for Ollama provider.

title: Include chapters for review items in exports
note: MP4 chapter markers per review item on export; minor (cluster w/ #23310).

note: Export an incident/case (clips+metadata) as an evidence zip. Check nurby evidence export.

note: VLM perf tuning; revisit in vlm pass.

title: Set min length for GenAI scene to encourage details
insight: Enforce a minimum description length to push the VLM toward detailed scene captions.
nurby_evidence: Nurby vlm prompt does not enforce a min length / retry-on-too-short.
action: Backlog: add min-length nudge / retry for short VLM captions.

title: Optimize face recognition
note: Face-rec perf; check nurby InsightFace batching/caching.

title: Camera access fixes
insight: Bug fixes in per-camera access enforcement.
nurby_evidence: Reinforces camera-ACL gap (issue #40).
action: Folded into initiatives/camera-access-control.md.

title: Enforce python-level timeout on ffprobe subprocesses
insight: A probe/ffmpeg subprocess with no python-level timeout can hang a worker forever on a stalled stream.
nurby_evidence: agent/analyzer.py and conversation_clip._run_ffmpeg awaited communicate() with NO timeout. (ffprobe itself not used by nurby.)
action: DONE: wrapped both in asyncio.wait_for + kill-on-timeout (analyzer 20s, clip 120s) + tests. webcam_bridge left long-lived (has restart supervision).

title: Stream probe fallback
insight: Fall back to an alternate probe method when the primary stream probe fails.
nurby_evidence: Check nurby stream open/probe (stream.py) for graceful fallback vs hard fail.
action: Backlog: probe fallback / reconnect robustness review.

note: Onboarding wizard polish; UI parity pass.

insight: DST transition produced wrong preview time ranges.

title: Fix json serialization error for license plate box coordinates
insight: numpy box coords/scores are not JSON-serializable -> TypeError when stored/broadcast.
nurby_evidence: Verified nurby casts all numpy to native at the vision boundary (detector.py:235-256, plates.py:171-181, faces.py:86-90); ws.py uses json.dumps(default=str) as a net. No bug.

title: Add warm-up to onnx as some GPUs require kernel compilation
insight: Warm up ONNX session to avoid first-inference kernel-compile stall on GPU.
nurby_evidence: Nurby runs ONNX (InsightFace) on CPU (CPUExecutionProvider); no GPU kernel compile. Low value until GPU support.
